title: New ransomware campaign targeting cloud infrastructure
description: Security researchers have identified a new ransomware variant specifically designed to target cloud-based infrastructure. The campaign uses compromised CI/CD pipelines to deploy malicious code.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The ransomware campaign poses a significant threat to cloud-based infrastructure, potentially leading to data encryption, service disruption, and financial losses. Exploiting CI/CD pipelines increases the risk of widespread compromise across development and production environments.
recommended_actions: Immediately review and secure CI/CD pipelines by implementing multi-factor authentication (MFA) and least privilege access controls.
Monitor cloud environments for unusual activity, such as unauthorized deployments or changes to configurations.
Ensure regular backups of critical data are stored securely offline and test the restoration process to minimize downtime in case of an attack.

title: Show HN: Open-source vulnerability scanner
description: New tool automatically scans dependencies for known vulnerabilities and suggests patches. Gaining traction in the security community.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with low severity.

title: A malicious LDAP server, which a Thunderbird user is configured to query for address-book...
description: A malicious LDAP server, which a Thunderbird user is configured to query for address-book autocomplete, can stash arbitrarily large amounts of attacker-supplied data into the Thunderbird LDAP client until it crashes due to memory exhaustion. This vulnerability was fixed in Thunderbird 152.0.1 and Thunderbird 140.12.1.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows a malicious LDAP server to crash Thunderbird clients via memory exhaustion, potentially disrupting operations and exposing systems to further exploitation.
recommended_actions: Update Thunderbird to the latest patched versions (152.0.1 or 140.12.1) immediately.
Audit LDAP server configurations and ensure only trusted servers are being queried.
Monitor Thunderbird clients for unusual memory usage or crashes and investigate promptly.

title: An attacker who can send HTML chat messages (via Matrix or XMPP) can inject arbitrary styled...
description: An attacker who can send HTML chat messages (via Matrix or XMPP) can inject arbitrary styled content, phishing links, and CSS that manipulates the chat UI. This vulnerability was fixed in Thunderbird 152.0.1 and Thunderbird 140.12.1.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with unknown severity. CVE: CVE-2026-57963.

title: ImageMagick before 7.1.2-13 contains a memory leak vulnerability in LoadOpenCLDeviceBenchmark()...
description: ImageMagick before 7.1.2-13 contains a memory leak vulnerability in LoadOpenCLDeviceBenchmark() function when parsing malformed OpenCL device profile XML files with unclosed device elements. Attackers with write access to the OpenCL cache directory can place malicious XML files to exhaust memory and cause denial of service.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with low severity. CVE: CVE-2026-56364.

title: ImageMagick before 7.1.2-22 contains a division by zero vulnerability in binomial kernel...
description: ImageMagick before 7.1.2-22 contains a division by zero vulnerability in binomial kernel processing that allows attackers to cause denial of service. An attacker can supply a large binomial kernel value causing integer overflow, resulting in division by zero and application crash.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The division by zero vulnerability in ImageMagick before version 7.1.2-22 can be exploited to cause a denial of service (DoS), leading to application crashes. This could disrupt services relying on ImageMagick for image processing, potentially impacting availability.
recommended_actions: Update ImageMagick to version 7.1.2-22 or later to mitigate the vulnerability.
Implement input validation to sanitize and verify user-supplied data before processing with ImageMagick.
Monitor application logs for unusual crashes or errors related to ImageMagick to detect potential exploitation attempts.

title: phpMyFAQ before 4.1.5 contains a privilege escalation vulnerability in GroupController:...
description: phpMyFAQ before 4.1.5 contains a privilege escalation vulnerability in GroupController::updatePermissions that allows GROUP_EDIT administrators to grant arbitrary rights to groups without verifying they hold those rights themselves. A delegated administrator can exploit this by assigning high-value permissions to a group they belong to, inheriting those rights and escalating privileges up to full administrative control.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-57995.

title: Grav CMS before 2.0.0-beta.2 contains multiple code-execution vulnerabilities. Three unsafe...
description: Grav CMS before 2.0.0-beta.2 contains multiple code-execution vulnerabilities. Three unsafe unserialize() calls - in Scheduler\JobQueue, Framework\Cache\Adapter\FileCache, and Session - deserialize untrusted data without restricting allowed classes, enabling PHP object injection and, via a gadget chain, arbitrary code execution where an attacker controls the serialized input. Additionally, InstallCommand's git clone operation passes the branch, url, and path parameters into a shell command witho

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerabilities in Grav CMS before 2.0.0-beta.2 allow attackers to execute arbitrary code via unsafe unserialize() calls and improper input sanitization in shell commands. This could lead to full system compromise, data breaches, or unauthorized access to sensitive information.
recommended_actions: Immediately upgrade to Grav CMS version 2.0.0-beta.2 or later to patch the vulnerabilities.
Audit and sanitize all serialized data inputs to prevent PHP object injection attacks.
Restrict access to administrative interfaces and implement web application firewalls (WAF) to block malicious payloads.

title: n8n before 2.25.7 and 2.26.x before 2.26.2 contains an abstract syntax tree (AST) security...
description: n8n before 2.25.7 and 2.26.x before 2.26.2 contains an abstract syntax tree (AST) security validator bypass in the Python Code node. An authenticated user with permission to create or modify workflows containing a Python Code node can bypass the validator and access the task executor module namespace. The issue only affects self-hosted instances where the Python Task Runner is enabled; where N8N_BLOCK_RUNNER_ENV_ACCESS is configured to allow it, this can disclose environment variables accessible

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-56777.

title: Storage Concentrator (SC & SCVM) contains a command injection vulnerability within the debug.pl...
description: Storage Concentrator (SC & SCVM) contains a command injection vulnerability within the debug.pl script that is reachable without authentication. A remote attacker can submit a specially crafted HTTP request containing a malicious payload that is processed without adequate input sanitization, resulting in arbitrary command execution with root-level privileges on the underlying system.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with critical severity. CVE: CVE-2026-56415.

title: ImageMagick before 7.1.2-19 contains a memory leak vulnerability in the PNG encoder when writing...
description: ImageMagick before 7.1.2-19 contains a memory leak vulnerability in the PNG encoder when writing MNG images. Attackers can trigger the encoder failure condition to exhaust memory resources and cause denial of service.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability in ImageMagick's PNG encoder can lead to memory exhaustion, potentially causing denial of service (DoS) attacks. This could disrupt operations for systems relying on ImageMagick for image processing.
recommended_actions: Update ImageMagick to version 7.1.2-19 or later to patch the vulnerability.
Implement resource monitoring and rate-limiting to mitigate potential exploitation.
Review systems using ImageMagick for PNG/MNG image processing and apply necessary security measures.

title: ImageMagick before 7.1.2-22 contains an information disclosure vulnerability in the...
description: ImageMagick before 7.1.2-22 contains an information disclosure vulnerability in the PasskeyEncipherImage method due to AES-CTR nonce reuse. Attackers can exploit nonce reuse in the cipher implementation to recover plaintext information from encrypted images.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-56369.

title: Open WebUI before 0.6.27 contains a server-side request forgery vulnerability in the /api/v1...
description: Open WebUI before 0.6.27 contains a server-side request forgery vulnerability in the /api/v1/retrieval/process/web endpoint that allows authenticated users to bypass SSRF protections. Attackers can manipulate URL parameters with location redirect headers to access internal services and potentially execute commands via instance secrets.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-56399.

title: Storage Concentrator (SC & SCVM) contains a command injection vulnerability in the ms_service.pl...
description: Storage Concentrator (SC & SCVM) contains a command injection vulnerability in the ms_service.pl service, which listens on TCP port 9000 by default and accepts custom network packets to perform device actions. An unauthenticated remote attacker can send a specially crafted packet containing a malicious payload that is processed without adequate sanitization, resulting in arbitrary command execution with root-level privileges.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The command injection vulnerability in the ms_service.pl service allows unauthenticated remote attackers to execute arbitrary commands with root-level privileges. This could lead to full system compromise, data breaches, ransomware deployment, or disruption of critical services.
recommended_actions: Immediately block inbound traffic to TCP port 9000 at the network perimeter using firewalls or access control lists (ACLs).
Apply the latest security patch or firmware update provided by the vendor to address CVE-2026-56413.
Conduct a thorough review of system logs to identify any signs of exploitation or unauthorized access, and isolate affected systems if necessary.

title: ImageMagick before 7.1.2-24 contains an incorrect policy check that allows attackers to create or...
description: ImageMagick before 7.1.2-24 contains an incorrect policy check that allows attackers to create or truncate files disallowed by security policies. Remote attackers can bypass path policy restrictions in sandboxed conversion services to write arbitrary files outside intended boundaries.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-56377.

title: Capgo before 12.128.2 contains an information disclosure vulnerability in the public...
description: Capgo before 12.128.2 contains an information disclosure vulnerability in the public.invite_user_to_org RPC function that allows unauthenticated attackers to enumerate organization existence by observing distinct error responses. Attackers can call the SECURITY DEFINER function with a publishable API key to determine if an organization ID exists based on NO_ORG versus NO_RIGHTS responses, enabling tenant enumeration attacks.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-56327.

title: Capgo before 12.128.2 contains an authorization flaw in POST /private/create_device that accepts...
description: Capgo before 12.128.2 contains an authorization flaw in POST /private/create_device that accepts a caller-supplied org_id parameter without validating it matches the target app's owner organization. Authenticated attackers can create device records for an application using a foreign organization identifier, bypassing the intended org/app authorization boundary.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows authenticated attackers to exploit an authorization flaw, enabling them to create unauthorized device records for applications using foreign organization identifiers. This could lead to data integrity issues, unauthorized access, and potential misuse of application resources.
recommended_actions: Upgrade Capgo to version 12.128.2 or later to patch the authorization flaw.
Audit application logs for any unauthorized device creation activities to identify potential exploitation.
Implement additional server-side validation to ensure org_id matches the target app's owner organization.

title: Capgo before 12.128.2 contains unauthenticated security definer RPC functions get_user_id and...
description: Capgo before 12.128.2 contains unauthenticated security definer RPC functions get_user_id and get_org_perm_for_apikey that expose API key validity oracles and user UUID disclosure. Unauthenticated attackers using the public API key can validate leaked keys, enumerate users and apps, and determine permission levels, significantly increasing the actionability of compromised credentials.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability in Capgo before 12.128.2 allows unauthenticated attackers to validate leaked API keys, enumerate users and apps, and determine permission levels. This could lead to unauthorized access, data breaches, and privilege escalation, significantly increasing the risk of compromised credentials being exploited.
recommended_actions: Immediately update Capgo to version 12.128.2 or later to patch the vulnerability.
Rotate all API keys and credentials that may have been exposed to mitigate potential misuse.
Implement stricter monitoring and logging for API access to detect and respond to unauthorized activities.

title: Capgo before 12.128.2 contains an authorization bypass vulnerability in the channel creation...
description: Capgo before 12.128.2 contains an authorization bypass vulnerability in the channel creation endpoint that allows authenticated users to overwrite existing channels by reusing their names. Attackers with app.create_channel permission can exploit a logic mismatch between existence validation and upsert operations to reassign channel ownership and modify critical production channel configurations.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-56249.

title: Flowise before 3.1.0 (affected versions 3.0.13 and earlier) uses a weak hardcoded default secret ...
description: Flowise before 3.1.0 (affected versions 3.0.13 and earlier) uses a weak hardcoded default secret ('flowise') for the express-session middleware when the EXPRESS_SESSION_SECRET environment variable is not set (packages/server/src/enterprise/middleware/passport/index.ts). Because this default secret is publicly visible in the source code, an attacker can forge valid signed session cookies to impersonate any user and bypass authentication.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with critical severity. CVE: CVE-2026-56278.

title: Capgo before 12.128.2 allows multiple public channels for the same app and platform to coexist...
description: Capgo before 12.128.2 allows multiple public channels for the same app and platform to coexist simultaneously, while unnamed /updates requests without defaultChannel implicitly resolve to a single hidden winner channel. An authorized app or channel manager can create ambiguous default update state and silently influence which bundle unnamed clients receive, breaking release routing integrity and predictability.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-56328.

title: ImageMagick before 7.1.2-19 contains an off-by-one error in morphology validation allowing out-of...
description: ImageMagick before 7.1.2-19 contains an off-by-one error in morphology validation allowing out-of-bounds heap buffer reads. Attackers can trigger heap buffer overflow by providing incorrect morphology parameters causing single pixel memory access violations.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-56361.

title: CVE-2026-12850 - Multiple OS command injection vulnerabilities exist in the libNetSetObj.so functionality of GeoVisio

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with critical severity. CVE: CVE-2026-12850.

title: CVE-2026-12849 - Multiple OS command injection vulnerabilities exist in the libNetSetObj.so functionality of GeoVisio

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows attackers to execute arbitrary OS commands remotely, potentially leading to full system compromise, data exfiltration, or disruption of services. This poses a significant threat to organizations relying on GeoVision devices for network management and surveillance.
recommended_actions: Immediately apply any available patches or firmware updates provided by GeoVision to mitigate the vulnerability.
Implement network segmentation to isolate vulnerable devices and restrict access to trusted IP ranges.
Monitor network traffic for unusual activity and deploy intrusion detection systems to identify potential exploitation attempts.

title: CVE-2026-12848 - GV-I/O Box 4E is a smart embedded device with 4 input and 4 relays output that can be controlled ove
description:
GV-I/O Box 4E is a smart embedded device with 4 input and 4 relays output that can be controlled over Ethernet and RS-485.

DVRSearch is a service running by default on the IOBox listening for UDP messages on port 10001. Any user on the network can send messages to this service and interact with it. 



Upon receiving a UDP message,  the server reads at most 1460 bytes into a local buffer and a pointer to the buffer is stored in a global variable:



#### DNS field stack overflow

The following code is vulnerable to a stack overflow that is attacker-controlled:



    v8 = strlen(g_network_config->dns_addr);

    memcpy(&reply_buf[248], g_network_config->dns_addr, v8);

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows attackers to exploit a stack overflow in the DNS field by sending crafted UDP messages to the GV-I/O Box 4E device, potentially leading to remote code execution, denial of service, or unauthorized control of the device.
recommended_actions: Immediately update the firmware of GV-I/O Box 4E devices to the latest version if a patch is available.
Implement network segmentation to isolate GV-I/O Box devices from untrusted networks and restrict UDP traffic on port 10001.
Monitor network traffic for unusual activity targeting port 10001 and deploy intrusion detection systems to identify exploitation attempts.

Upon receiving a UDP message,  the server reads at most 1460 bytes into a local buffer and a pointer to the buffer is stored in a global variable:


#### Gateway field stack overflow

The following code is vulnerable to a stack overflow that is attacker-controlled:



      v7 = strlen(g_network_config->gateway);

      memcpy(&reply_buf[216], g_network_config->gateway, v7);

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with critical severity. CVE: CVE-2026-12847.

title: CVE-2026-12488 - A memory corruption vulnerability exists in the GV-Cloud functionality of GeoVision GV-VMS V20 20.0.
description:
A memory corruption vulnerability exists in the GV-Cloud functionality of GeoVision GV-VMS V20 20.0.2. 


A specially crafted network request can lead to a denial of service. An attacker can impersonate the legitimate server to trigger this vulnerability.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-12488.

title: CVE-2026-3652 - The ARForms plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Stored Cross-Site Scripting via the `value` parame
description: The ARForms plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Stored Cross-Site Scripting via the `value` parameter of the `arf_save_incomplete_form_data` AJAX action in all versions up to, and including, 7.1.3 due to insufficient input sanitization and output escaping. This makes it possible for unauthenticated attackers to inject arbitrary web scripts that will execute whenever an administrator views the "Partial Filled Form Entries" page in the ARForms dashboard.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-3652.

title: CVE-2026-11614 - The Xpro Addons — 140+ Widgets for Elementor plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Stored Cross-Site
description: The Xpro Addons — 140+ Widgets for Elementor plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Stored Cross-Site Scripting via the 'custom_attributes' parameter in all versions up to, and including, 1.7.2 due to insufficient input sanitization and output escaping. This makes it possible for authenticated attackers, with author-level access and above, to inject arbitrary web scripts in pages that will execute whenever a user accesses an injected page.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-11614.

title: CVE-2026-12681 - Improper Validation of Specified Index, Position, or Offset in Input vulnerability in Google go-atte
description: Improper Validation of Specified Index, Position, or Offset in Input vulnerability in Google go-attestation. parseEfiSignatureList() does not advance the buffer past vendor bytes before reading entries. For hashSHA256SigGUID lists, this allows attacker-controlled vendor header bytes to be appended to the trusted SHA256 hash list. A crafted TPM event log could inject arbitrary SHA256 hashes into the verifier's trusted measurement database, enabling a remote attestation verifier to accept a compromised boot state. This issue affects go-attestation: through 0.6.0.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-12681.

title: CVE-2026-54639 - Style Dictionary, a build system for creating cross-platform styles, has a prototype pollution vulne
description: Style Dictionary, a build system for creating cross-platform styles, has a prototype pollution vulnerability starting in version 4.3.0 and prior to version 5.4.4. Impact users have: direct usage of `convertTokenData(tokens, { output: 'object' });`; indirect usage, via using Expand API; and/or indirect usage via SD's transform lifecycle. Impact is high for this when style-dictionary is used as an integration in a NodeJS server application. Impact is moderate for when style-dictionary is used as an integration in a Web application. Impact is low for most common cases where the user of style-dictionary also maintains the tokens, and access is limited via read/write access to the repository/workflows where it is used. A patch has been published in version `5.4.4`. The only known workaround is to sanitize token data first. Whether using DTCG format or old Style Dictionary format, check the token data object recursively for any object keys that include `__proto__`.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-54639.

title: CVE-2026-7574 - Anthropic Claude Desktop Cowork VM image handling (confirmed across v1.1348.0 through v1.2278.0, inc
description: Anthropic Claude Desktop Cowork VM image handling (confirmed across v1.1348.0 through v1.2278.0, including v1.1348.0, v1.1617.0, and v1.2278.0) validates only file presence and a version marker string before booting rootfs.img, but does not verify image content integrity at time-of-use. A local attacker with unprivileged code execution as the victim macOS user can modify the VM root filesystem image and have it trusted on subsequent Cowork VM boots, enabling persistent arbitrary code execution in the VM and access to host-mounted directories. The estimated CWE mapping is CWE-353 (Missing Support for Integrity Check).

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-7574.

title: CVE-2026-6458 - Missing cryptographic step in Caliptra Core Firmware (aes_256_gcm_update module) results in an incor
description:
Missing cryptographic step in Caliptra Core Firmware (aes_256_gcm_update module) results in an incorrect GCM authentication tag. When the streaming AES-256-GCM API is used with empty AAD, the hardware GHASH accumulator state is not saved after the first update call, causing the final tag to exclude the first batch of processed ciphertext. Ciphertext produced by that call may be modified without the tag reflecting the change.

This issue affects Core Runtime Firmware: from 2.0.0 through 2.0.1, 2.1.0.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-6458.

title: CVE-2026-5818 - Incorrect check of function return value in Caliptra Core Runtime Firmware (ActivateFirmwareCmd::act
description:
Incorrect check of function return value in Caliptra Core Runtime Firmware (ActivateFirmwareCmd::activate_fw modules) allows bypass of Caliptra Core's verification of the MCU FW during a hitless update.

This issue affects Core Runtime Firmware: from 2.0.0 through 2.0.1, 2.1.0.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-5818.
